# Friendly Painters

> Painter serving Albany, NY and surrounding areas. Friendly Painters provides quality painter services in Albany, NY. Licensed, insured, and locally trusted.

## Key Facts
- Business: Friendly Painters
- Category: Painter
- Location: Serving Albany and Surrounding Areas, Albany, NY
- Phone: (518) 379-6182
- Email: contact@friendly-painters.com
- Rating: 4.6/5 from 16 reviews
- Years in business: 10
- Jobs completed: 200

## Services
- [Interior Painting](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/friendly-painters//services/interior-painting/): Professional interior painting services.
- [Exterior Painting](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/friendly-painters//services/exterior-painting/): Professional exterior painting services.
- [Cabinet Painting](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/friendly-painters//services/cabinet-painting/): Professional cabinet painting services.
- [Deck Staining](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/friendly-painters//services/deck-staining/): Professional deck staining services.
- [Drywall Repair](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/friendly-painters//services/drywall-repair/): Professional drywall repair services.
- [Commercial Painting](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/friendly-painters//services/commercial-painting/): Professional commercial painting services.
